title: rosa canina var. oblonga
intro: Rosa canina var. oblonga, also known as the English dog rose, is a variant of the Rosa canina species, characterized by its elongated hips and fragrant flowers. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its rich content of vitamins A and C, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. oblonga have been associated with various health benefits, including improving cardiovascular health, boosting the immune system, and supporting eye health. Rosa canina var. oblonga can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
